name: Incidents Root-Caused
description: AI-related incidents are recorded with root-cause analysis and remediation actions.
rationale: IOSCO Table 6.5 / §3.4: negative outcomes should be recorded and root cause analysis performed to determine cause and remediation; detailed records of AI-related incidents are maintained.

examples.fails: an AI incident logged without root-cause analysis

source: IOSCO FR/02/2026 — Supervisory Toolkit for AI Use in Capital Markets (May 2026), Ch.3 Tables 5 (Disclosure) and 6 (Recordkeeping & reporting).
